# The Bleating Gate

A weatherworn stone arch on the southern road into Otari, named for the
unsettling sound the wind makes through its cracked lintel. Two abandoned
guard posts flank it; one has been repurposed as a shepherd's lean-to.

## Notable features

- A faded carving of a ram on the keystone.
- Smugglers' marks scratched on the inner pillars.
